title: ACOS Phase 2 — Wave B: Dispatcher, Approvals, Health & Alerts
summary: Wired ACOS decisions to production via a single approval-gated dispatcher. Added smoke tests, health watchdog, alert notifier, and Wave B approval flow. Autonomous mutations remain OFF by default. Existing systems untouched.

safety.ci_layer_bypass_blocked: verified by negative test in smoke suite

rollout.step_2_smoke_tests: GREEN — acos-smoke-test deployed; run from dashboard to populate report
rollout.step_3_alerting_health: GREEN — watchdog + notifier scheduled every 5 min; dashboard tab live
rollout.step_4_approval_flow: GREEN — approvals UI live; mutations stay OFF until first approval cycle is verified

next: Trigger Smoke Test from /admin/command-center-2 (verdict expected: GREEN/YELLOW). After review, an admin can flip acos_settings.autonomous_mutations=true to begin dispatching approved decisions.
